title: Sour Crumbly Korean Eggplant Creme Fraiche
description: A savory and slightly sour crumble made from eggplants, combined with creme fraiche and other traditional Korean flavors for a unique solo dinner dish.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons Korean gochujang (Korean red pepper paste)

instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat.
Cut each eggplant into quarters and then slice them thinly. Arrange in the pressure cooker evenly.
Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of creme fraiche, sprinkle gochujang, minced garlic, grated ginger, and lemon juice over the eggplants.
Close the lid and lock it in place. Pressure cook on high for about 20 minutes. Turn off heat but leave the valve open to release pressure.
Let the pressure cooker sit for at least 10 minutes before opening. Remove from heat.
Gently mash the eggplants with a fork or spoon, ensuring they are slightly crumbly in texture. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or appetizer.
